channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: What we know about deadly strike on Kabul medical centre
item.description: Afghan officials say a suspected Pakistani air strike hit a drug rehabilitation centre in Kabul, killing hundreds.

item.title: Macron prepares France for ‘an age of nuclear weapons’ as Iran war rages
item.description: The French president described his plans for expansion as forward deterrence. What's behind his move?

item.title: The US-Israel war on Iran is shaped by religion as much as strategy
item.description: The conflict has mutated into a zero-sum collision of competing messianic frameworks.

item.title: Iran blames US, Israel for Hormuz tensions as crisis risks energy supplies
item.description: Iran's Araghchi calls for global condemnation of ‘military aggression’ that disrupted transit through Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: UN warns of record hunger, 45 million more at risk, if Iran war continues
item.description: The Middle East conflict risks adding a staggering 45 million to acute hunger, warns the UN's World Food Programme.

item.title: Are the US and Israel waging war on Iran’s cultural heritage?
item.description: Iran says at least 56 of its heritage sites damaged or destroyed in war.

item.title: German Chancellor says Iran war has no military solution
item.description: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz said the Iran conflict cannot be resolved militarily and must be resolved politically.

item.title: Could the Iran war trigger a global recession?
item.description: Energy prices are surging as the Iran war disrupts supply, raising risks for the US, China and Europe.

item.title: Israel says Iran’s security chief Larijani has been killed
item.description: Israel’s Defence Minister Israel Katz says Ali Larijani, Iran’s security chief, has been killed in an Israeli strike.

item.title: Israel says it’s killed Iran’s security chief Larijani and Basij commander
item.description: Israeli Defence Minister Katz has claimed that Iran’s top security official has been killed; Iran is yet to comment.
